overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage transitioning from driving through a futuristic downtown avenue at dusk to walking through neon-lit streets. The scene features towering glass skyscrapers, palm-lined boulevards, and vibrant neon signage, shifting from vehicle-mounted perspective to third-person pedestrian view as the character navigates crosswalks and waterfront promenades.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown avenue with palm tree median

agents.ego_description: driving a vehicle down a wide futuristic avenue at high speed, passing other cars and approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving in the left lane, overtaking the ego vehicle

entered.detail: tall angular glass buildings with illuminated windows forming the downtown skyline
row of palm trees lining the right side of the boulevard
futuristic advertising signs with blue and purple neon lighting
wide paved road with white lane markings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-speed drive through a futuristic downtown avenue at dusk. Towering glass skyscrapers line the left side while palm trees border the right. The camera follows the vehicle as it navigates through moderate traffic, with neon signs beginning to illuminate against the darkening sky.

events.description: vehicle begins slowing down as it approaches the intersection
vehicle comes to a complete stop at the yellow crosswalk, waiting for pedestrians

agents.ego_description: bringing the vehicle to a stop at the intersection crosswalk, waiting for the crossing signal

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians beginning to cross the street at the crosswalk ahead

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
large illuminated advertisement featuring a woman in a helmet with NiCola branding

segments.scene_description: The vehicle decelerates as it approaches a major intersection, revealing a distinctive yellow crosswalk and a large NiCola advertisement billboard. The camera comes to rest at the crosswalk as pedestrians begin crossing, with the glass skyscrapers now looming closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with elevated highway overhead

events.description: perspective shifts from vehicle to pedestrian, character exits vehicle and begins walking
character begins crossing the yellow crosswalk on foot, following other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection crosswalk, then proceeding along the waterfront promenade, following other pedestrians through the neon-lit environment

notable_agents.action: blonde man in brown jacket walking ahead of the camera along the promenade

entered.detail: wet concrete walkway reflecting neon lights, littered with debris and trash
low concrete barrier separating the walkway from the water below
massive concrete overpass and support columns with vehicles visible traveling above

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person pedestrian view as the character crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk and enters a waterfront promenade. The wet concrete reflects the surrounding neon lights while the elevated highway structure dominates the left side. The camera follows a blonde man in a brown jacket along the walkway, passing other pedestrians in the moderate crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with commercial buildings and digital advertising

events.description: walking from covered promenade into more open plaza area with wider street crossing ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through the pedestrian plaza, passing various NPCs and approaching another intersection with moving traffic

notable_agents.action: person with distinctive zebra-patterned head tattoo walking ahead, wearing a gray tank top

entered.detail: multiple large LED screens displaying animated advertisements on building facades
low-rise structures with extensive neon signage and illuminated glass fronts

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open urban plaza lined with digital billboards and futuristic commercial buildings. The elevated highway remains visible in the background while the camera follows a distinctive NPC with a zebra-patterned head tattoo. The environment transitions from the waterfront to a more commercial district with scattered pedestrian traffic and approaching vehicles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous movement from a high-speed drive through a futuristic downtown avenue at dusk into a pedestrian exploration of a neon-lit commercial district. It begins with a vehicle navigating a boulevard lined with towering glass skyscrapers and palm trees as neon signs flicker to life against the darkening sky. As the vehicle decelerates toward a major intersection, the camera focuses on a yellow crosswalk and a large NiCola billboard before the perspective shifts to a third-person view of a blonde man in a brown jacket. The scene then expands onto a waterfront promenade where wet concrete reflects the surrounding lights under a dominating elevated highway, following the character through a moderate crowd. Finally, the movement carries the character into an open urban plaza filled with digital billboards and futuristic buildings, passing a pedestrian with a zebra-patterned head tattoo as the environment transitions into a bustling commercial hub.
